description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a mix of brick and light-colored wall surfaces, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small covered porch, a sloped roof section, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The side elevations reveal a combination of flat and gently sloped rooflines, as well as additional windows and a secondary entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area, bordered by dense foliage and flowering trees, providing privacy and a natural retreat. The property is set on a rectangular lot with a paved driveway and a manicured lawn. The overall appearance is contemporary yet inviting, blending architectural elements with abundant greenery.
description: A modern, brick-and-light-toned bungalow with large windows, a small front porch, and lush landscaping on all sides. The design features flat and sloped roofs, surrounded by mature trees and a private garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small porch, driveway, and manicured lawn with trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mix of brick and light wall surfaces, large windows, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden area, surrounded by thick foliage and flowering trees, with the back of the bungalow visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, a secondary entrance, and the continuation of the landscaped perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
